biases_detected: shell_tool_preference_violations:RECURRING:STABLE — unit-10 (cat+head-80 via Bash for JSON config files instead of Read); unit-18 (ls-la+find 5-type compound via Bash instead of Glob/LS); unit-30 (ls-la via Bash for .claude/ and lib/providers/ directory inspection); unit-31 (ls-la+pandas inline JSON via Bash instead of LS/mcp__file-tools); unit-47 (ls-la via Bash for Downloads/Jun_8/ directory instead of Glob/LS); 5 of 10 substantive tool-using units, rate matches or worsens prior two-cycle peaks (4/13 and 5/9), zero downward trajectory across eight consecutive cycles, pattern is entrenched

analysis_conclusion_without_sufficient_verification:NEW — unit-47 (pinecone on/off diff analysis completed via inline pandas Bash script and conclusions reported; outcome marked Corrected in unit-48; user correction indicates the framing or conclusions were wrong enough to require a follow-on correction turn; analysis scripts ran successfully=true but result interpretation was not verified before reporting; first instance of this specific pattern across all calibration history on record)
recommendations: shell_tool_preference_violations is entrenched across eight consecutive cycles with zero trajectory improvement and has been flagged in every prior recommendation set — deprioritize repeating this recommendation; only re-escalate if per-cycle count rises above 5 or if a new tool category joins the violation set

mcp_retry_without_diagnosis: unit-47 introduces a variant (skip MCP entirely for Excel, go straight to pandas) that may represent adaptive avoidance of a persistently failing tool rather than the original retry-without-diagnosis pattern — monitor next two cycles to determine whether this variant should be classified as a separate bias or as a degenerate form of the original; if MCP begins succeeding, the bypass behavior becomes a regression

analysis_conclusion_without_sufficient_verification (NEW): before reporting quantitative comparison conclusions derived from inline Bash data scripts, add a verification step that confirms data alignment assumptions (column name matching, join key validity, expected row counts) before interpreting deltas; single occurrence does not establish a pattern but warrants a watch flag for the next two cycles
